Following are the yearly predictions predicted by me and

India in 2002!
Tuesday, 28 January , 2003, 00:00
The bulls will return to the markets, somewhat reluctantly, in May 2002. Till then the
bears will be playing footsie with the Sensex. If you are planning to invest, wait till
they retreat. The year 2002 is not expected to be spectacular for software stocks. But
